scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @cetec/styled-system & npm run dev -w @cetec/components
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cetec/styled-system && npm run build -w @cetec/components
scripts.storybook: npm run build -w @cetec/styled-system && npm run storybook -w @cetec/components
scripts.storybook:build: npm run build -w @cetec/styled-system && npm run storybook:build -w @cetec/components
scripts.playroom: npm run build -w @cetec/styled-system && npm run playroom -w @cetec/components
scripts.playroom:build: npm run build -w @cetec/styled-system && npm run playroom:build -w @cetec/components
